description: You are a Fire Protection Engineer. The FZK-Haus residential building model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Add life safety equipment to the model for code compliance by creating at least two smoke detectors (IFC class IfcAlarm, PredefinedType SMOKE) and at least two fire extinguishers (IFC class IfcFireSuppressionTerminal, PredefinedType FIREEXTINGUISHER). Ensure all newly created life safety elements are spatially contained within a building storey (e.g., Ground Floor or First Floor). Save the updated project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_fire_equipment.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, requires some correct elements and typing/containment
